$comment: Generated by Phase C gate (hallucination-detector + context-faithfulness-engineer), 2026-06-06. Audit-only; no code or other phase artifact modified. NLI = (entailed checks / total checks): degree to which the implementation is entailed by the approved specs (no invented behavior). FactScore = (referenced entities verifiably resolvable / total): degree to which every referenced endpoint, schema field, agent, function, and section_id semantic actually exists and is reachable. Gate PASSES only at NLI=1.0 AND FactScore=1.0.

resolved_findings.claim: The router exposed at /v1/route and /v1/answer never selects a section_id absent from the document's authoritative TOC, end-to-end.
resolved_findings.resolution: dependencies.get_router returns a live RouterModuleAdapter (no 503). The adapter loads the tenant-scoped authoritative TOC from the DocumentStore and calls router.route(query, doc_id, toc, tenant_id=..., confidence_threshold=..., max_sections=...); ids absent from the TOC are dropped on the live path. Multi-document is routing-only (ADV-006): one route call per doc, merged by descending confidence, each stamped with its document_id. The router adapter has no generation dependency and /v1/route depends only on the store + router.
resolved_findings.evidence: backend/app/api/dependencies.py:49-60 (live RouterModuleAdapter); backend/app/adapters/router.py:143 (store.get_sections tenant-scoped TOC load), :146-153 (router.route call), :82-84 (drops ids not in TOC), :185-195 (ADV-006 per-doc fan-out + merge), :94 (document_id stamp), :25-30 (imports interfaces only - no generation); router/__init__.py:26-35 (signature match); router/graph.py:166-169 (in-router TOC filter); backend/app/api/routing.py:57-58 (store + router only); db document_store.py:189-196 (tenant filter on TOC read)

resolved_findings.claim: Uploading via POST /v1/documents runs the real parse->TOC->chunk->embed->upsert pipeline and returns the openapi IngestResponse, end-to-end.
resolved_findings.resolution: dependencies.get_ingestor returns a live PipelineIngestor (no 503). The adapter builds an IngestInput from backend kwargs, runs ingestion.ingest_document off the event loop, and maps {doc_id,toc,section_rows_written,chunks_upserted,fallback_only} onto IngestOutcome{doc_id,title,total_pages,toc,ingest_status,deduplicated}. total_pages from TOC; ingest_status from retention+fallback_only; deduplicated from a content-hash pre-lookup; section ids mirror the pipeline's deterministic derivation.
resolved_findings.evidence: backend/app/api/dependencies.py:63-86 (live PipelineIngestor); backend/app/adapters/ingestor.py:204-225 (IngestInput build + result->IngestOutcome map), :211 (anyio.to_thread.run_sync off-loop), :88-114 (_total_pages/_ingest_status), :165-167 (find_doc_id_by_hash dedup -> stores.py:57-72), :46-59 (section_id mirrors ingestion.pipeline._DOC_ID_NAMESPACE + '{doc_id}:section:{ordinal}' = pipeline.py:215-225); ingestion/pipeline.py:184-196 (result dict shape)

resolved_findings.claim: The live DocumentStore (IDOR guard + DPDP outbox) and streaming GenerationLLM run against real collaborators rather than only test fakes.
resolved_findings.resolution: dependencies.get_document_store returns a live SqlAlchemyDocumentStore over db.models and get_generation_llm returns a live ClaudeGenerationLLM (no 503). The tenant IDOR filter is present on every store query. Erasure = tombstone + ErasureOutbox rows in one transaction (idempotent second delete -> False/404; DB-down -> DependencyUnavailable -> 503). Access export stays field-metadata-only via build_pii_inventory. Generation synthesizes prose over routed sections only; it is invoked separately from the router, so routing-only is preserved; credentials are env-resolved and the client is lazy.
resolved_findings.evidence: backend/app/api/dependencies.py:31-46 (live store), :89-98 (live ClaudeGenerationLLM); document_store.py:125-129/154-158/189-196/222-226 (tenant filter on every query), :229-242 (tombstone + outbox in one txn), :231-232 (idempotent->False), :243-244 (503); answer.py:127 (generation consumes router decision separately); helpers.build_pii_inventory via documents.py:365-371 (field-metadata only); generation.py:84-102 (lazy, env-resolved key)

verdict_reason: Re-check after the integration repair. The three prior UNVERIFIABLE cross-module seams (FIX-C-01 router TOC-filter end-to-end, FIX-C-02 ingest contract end-to-end, FIX-C-03 live store/generation) are now ENTAILED via real adapters under backend/app/adapters/* wired through backend/app/api/dependencies.py (all 503 stubs removed). The TOC-membership filter, the IngestOutcome mapping, the tenant IDOR filter on every store query, the tombstone+outbox erasure, and the field-metadata-only access export all run on live, joined code paths. No endpoint, schema field, or invariant changed - openapi stays authoritative, /v1/route is still routing-only (router adapter has no generation dependency), and the tenant guard is intact. No new contradiction. NLI=FactScore=32/32=1.0, so the gate PASSES.

suites_rerun.frontend_vitest: not re-run (no frontend code changed in the repair; prior 48 passed across 12 files stands)
